name: Take That Back!! Take Back What You Said!!

issues.description: PowerBoost action is missing the conditional check for 'Whitebeard Pirates' type. The effect should only boost if the revealed card includes that type.
Trigger 'Trigger' is unclear/invalid. The reveal action should be part of the Counter resolution sequence, not a separate triggered effect.
DrawCard should be RevealFromDeck or similar (reveal, not draw). Card is revealed from top of deck, not added to hand.
Missing condition structure to check revealed card type before executing PowerBoost. DSL requires conditional logic linking reveal → type check → power boost.
